category.scope_note: Cosmetics and personal care products for the EU market under Regulation (EC) No 1223/2009, compared with Chinese NMPA requirements under CSAR 2021.

title.zh: 中国化妆品进入欧盟：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國化妝品進入歐盟：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese cosmetics compliance under CSAR 2021 and NMPA requirements against EU Regulation (EC) No 1223/2009, covering the Responsible Person, CPNP notification, safety reports, prohibited and restricted substances, positive lists, GMP, nanomaterials, labelling, and claims requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国化妆品合规（CSAR 2021及NMPA要求）与欧盟法规（EC）第1223/2009号差距对照，涵盖责任人、CPNP通报、安全报告、禁用及限用物质、准许清单、良好生产规范、纳米材料、标签及宣称要求。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國化妝品合規（CSAR 2021及NMPA要求）與歐盟法規（EC）第1223/2009號差距對照，涵蓋責任人、CPNP通報、安全報告、禁用及限用物質、準許清單、良好生產規範、納米材料、標籤及宣稱要求。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid for general reference only. It is not a regulatory decision, legal opinion, notified-body assessment, cosmetic product safety assessment, CPNP submission, product registration service, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, Responsible Persons, and safety assessors should verify current EU law, NMPA requirements, applicable ingredient restrictions, and labelling obligations with qualified regulatory professionals before placing products on any market. Regulatory requirements change frequently; always consult the current consolidated text of Regulation (EC) No 1223/2009 and current NMPA guidance.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为一般性信息对照参考工具，不构成监管决定、法律意见、公告机构评审、化妆品产品安全评估、CPNP提交、产品注册服务或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、责任人和安全评估员在将产品投放任何市场前，应与合格的监管专业人士核验现行欧盟法律、NMPA要求、适用成分限制及标签义务。监管要求频繁变化；请始终参阅欧盟法规（EC）第1223/2009号的最新综合文本及现行NMPA指导文件。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為一般性資訊對照參考工具，不構成監管決定、法律意見、公告機構評審、化妝品產品安全評估、CPNP提交、產品註冊服務或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、責任人和安全評估員在將產品投放任何市場前，應與合格的監管專業人士核驗現行歐盟法律、NMPA要求、適用成分限制及標籤義務。監管要求頻繁變化；請始終參閱歐盟法規（EC）第1223/2009號的最新綜合文本及現行NMPA指導文件。

answer_first.en: Chinese cosmetics exporters must appoint an EU-established Responsible Person, complete CPNP pre-market notification, commission a CPSR from a qualified EU safety assessor, verify all ingredients against EU Annex II–VI substance lists, confirm ISO 22716 GMP compliance, and prepare EU-language labels with the RP's address, PAO symbol, and full INCI list — all before the first shipment.
answer_first.zh: 中国化妆品出口商须在首次出货前：指定欧盟境内责任人、完成CPNP上市前通报、委托欧盟合格安全评估员编制CPSR、核查所有成分是否符合欧盟附件II至VI物质清单、确认ISO 22716 GMP合规，并准备包含责任人地址、PAO标志及完整INCI清单的欧盟语言标签。
answer_first.zht: 中國化妝品出口商須在首次出貨前：指定歐盟境內責任人、完成CPNP上市前通報、委託歐盟合格安全評估員編製CPSR、核查所有成分是否符合歐盟附件II至VI物質清單、確認ISO 22716 GMP合規，並準備包含責任人地址、PAO標誌及完整INCI清單的歐盟語言標籤。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, EU institution, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.

q.en: Is a Responsible Person mandatory for selling cosmetics in the EU, and can a Chinese manufacturer serve as the EU Responsible Person?
q.zh: 在欧盟销售化妆品是否必须指定责任人？中国制造商是否可担任欧盟责任人？
q.zht: 在歐盟銷售化妝品是否必須指定責任人？中國製造商是否可擔任歐盟責任人？

a.en: Yes, a Responsible Person (RP) is mandatory under Article 4 of EU Cosmetics Regulation 1223/2009. The RP must be established within the EU — a Chinese manufacturer cannot serve as the RP directly. The RP is legally accountable for EU compliance, holds the Product Information File, and completes CPNP pre-market notification.
a.zh: 是的，根据欧盟《化妆品法规》1223/2009第4条，责任人（RP）是强制要求。RP须在欧盟境内设立——中国制造商不能直接担任RP。RP对欧盟合规性承担法律责任，持有产品信息档案，并完成CPNP上市前通报。
a.zht: 是的，根據歐盟《化妝品法規》1223/2009第4條，責任人（RP）是強制要求。RP須在歐盟境內設立——中國製造商不能直接擔任RP。RP對歐盟合規性承擔法律責任，持有產品信息檔案，並完成CPNP上市前通報。

q.en: Which EU regulation governs cosmetic safety, and what pre-market steps are required?
q.zh: 哪项欧盟法规管辖化妆品安全？上市前须完成哪些步骤？
q.zht: 哪項歐盟法規管轄化妝品安全？上市前須完成哪些步驟？

a.en: Regulation (EC) No 1223/2009 governs cosmetics on the EU market. Before first placing a product on the EU market, the Responsible Person must: (1) complete CPNP notification (Article 13); (2) commission a Cosmetic Product Safety Report (CPSR) from a qualified safety assessor (Annex I); (3) verify all ingredients against Annexes II–VI substance lists; and (4) confirm GMP per ISO 22716:2007 (Article 8).
a.zh: 《法规（EC）No 1223/2009》管辖欧盟市场的化妆品。责任人须在首次投放欧盟市场前：(1)完成CPNP通报（第13条）；(2)委托合格安全评估员编制化妆品产品安全报告（CPSR，附件I）；(3)核查所有成分是否符合附件II至VI物质清单；(4)依据ISO 22716:2007确认GMP合规（第8条）。
a.zht: 《法規（EC）No 1223/2009》管轄歐盟市場的化妝品。責任人須在首次投放歐盟市場前：(1)完成CPNP通報（第13條）；(2)委託合格安全評估員編製化妝品產品安全報告（CPSR，附件I）；(3)核查所有成分是否符合附件II至VI物質清單；(4)依據ISO 22716:2007確認GMP合規（第8條）。

q.en: Is animal testing of cosmetics banned in the EU?
q.zh: 欧盟是否禁止对化妆品进行动物测试？
q.zht: 歐盟是否禁止對化妝品進行動物測試？

a.en: Yes. Article 18 of Regulation (EC) No 1223/2009 prohibits placing on the EU market cosmetics whose final formulation has been tested on animals, as well as cosmetics containing ingredients tested on animals for cosmetic purposes, where alternative methods are available. This ban applies to products sold in the EU regardless of where testing occurred.
a.zh: 是的。《法规（EC）No 1223/2009》第18条禁止将最终配方经过动物测试的化妆品投放欧盟市场，以及将含有为化妆品目的而进行动物测试（已有替代方法）的成分的化妆品投放市场。无论测试在哪里进行，该禁令适用于在欧盟销售的产品。
a.zht: 是的。《法規（EC）No 1223/2009》第18條禁止將最終配方經過動物測試的化妝品投放歐盟市場，以及將含有為化妝品目的而進行動物測試（已有替代方法）的成分的化妝品投放市場。無論測試在哪裡進行，該禁令適用於在歐盟銷售的產品。
